title: Triple Inventory
description: Gives you a bigger inventory, access shulker boxes and ender chests from the inventory, and more
body:
## Triple Inventory **Triple Inventory** aims to solve the serious inventory space issues in Minecraft by simply giving you a bigger inventory, along with some quality of life changes. This mod can add up to **72** new inventory slots, including **18** new hotbar slots - these slots are also accessible in containers.
You can access shulker boxes and ender chests from your inventory by right clicking them - including adding and taking items.
There are also options to automatically switch to the best tool in your hotbar when using an item. Change the number of available slots with the `extendedInventorySize` gamerule. This determines how many new inventory columns to add either side of the main inventory. (default 3, max 9, set to 0 to disable extended inventory). ## Configuration

Config can be edited using Mod Menu or in tripleinventory.json

showExtendedHotbar: Show the extended hotbar on the HUD (default true)

scrollToExtendedHotbar: Access the extended hotbar using the scroll wheel (default true)

showExtendedInventoryWithRecipeBook: Show the extended inventory when the recipe book is open (default true)

autoSelectTools: Automatically select the best tool in the hotbar when mining (default false)

showPreviousSelectedSlotIndicator: Show an indicator on your previously selected slot after automatically selecting a tool (default true)

autoReturnOnUse: Automatically return to the last manually selected slot when using an item (default false)

autoReturnAfterCooldown: Automatically return to the last manually selected slot after a cooldown (default false)

autoReturnCooldown: The number of ticks after which to return to the last selected slot (default 40)

colorShulkerBackground: Change the background colour of the shulker preview to match the shulker box colour (default true)

shulkerPosition: The position of the shulker preview (default BOTTOM, allowed values BOTTOM, TOP, LEFT_TOP, LEFT_BOTTOM, RIGHT_TOP, RIGHT_BOTTOM)

Hotkeys to switch to extended hotbar slots are available in the vanilla controls settings

## Important Information This mod requires [Yet Another Config Lib (YACL)](https://modrinth.com/mod/yacl). It is also recommended to use [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) on the clientside to change settings. Due to the nature of this mod, there is a small risk of **duplication glitches or item loss**. Report any issues on the [issue tracker](https://github.com/HB0P/Triple-Inventory/issues). You can post suggestions there too! This mod is likely to be **incompatible** with other mods which modify the player's inventory or other vanilla inventories. The extended inventory will not appear in modded inventories. Feel free to report incompatibilities on the issue tracker, but they may not be possible to resolve.
